title: N&T NIETING Artificial Tulips Flowers, 12Pcs Fake Tulip Real Touch Latex Faux Tulips Flowers Bouquet for Wedding Floral Arrangements Party Hotel Home Decoration(Purple)
features: Real Touch Tulips: Looking for a way to bring the beauty of nature indoors? Look no further than tulips. These stunning tulips are perfect for adding a touch of natural charm and sophistication to any room. Whether arranged in a vase or displayed as a centerpiece, tulips artificial flowers are sure to impress

Material: Tulip flower head made of high-quality latex foam, flower stem made of plastic, inside with wire. The fake tulips are of the highest quality and easy to clean. Ideal for placing in a vase, filling centrepieces or decorating weddings and home

Versatile Home Decor: Each pack contains 12 artificial tulips. Measuring approximately 35cm in length, the stem can be bent or cut off, suitable for most vases. These artificial tulip flowers are a beautiful and easy to care for decoration option for any room

Many Colour Choices: Tulip artificial flowers are available in a variety of colours and can be placed in a vase in your dining room or wrapped around a wreath for a door decoration, they are also a great partner for a spring picnic

Wide Application: These latex tulips come in different colours and are suitable for any occasion such as anniversaries, Mother's Day, Easter, Christmas and other important days. Whether as a gift or to decorate your home or garden, artificial tulips are a stunning choice
description: Product Description Previous page Home Decorations Table Decorations Holiday Gifts Wedding Decorations DIY Bouquet Next page This tulips are perfect for making bouquets, centerpieces or any other flower decorations or arrangement for your wedding, party, baby shower or home. N&T NIETING Artificial Flowers, Real Touch Tulips Long-lasting beauty: Artificial tulips can maintain their vibrant colors and shape for years, unlike real tulips which have a relatively short lifespan. Allergy-free: For those who suffer from allergies, artificial tulips offer a beautiful and safe alternative to real flowers. Low-maintenance: Artificial tulips require no water, sunlight, or pruning, making them a low-maintenance option for busy people. Easy to clean: Artificial tulips can be easily cleaned with a cloth or duster. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup.
